51.reason: Error: Resetting k to 1 after each insertion causes incorrect height calculation for all nodes except the root. The height should be tracked recursively based on depth, not reset globally.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Resetting k to 1 after each insertion causes incorrect height calculation for all nodes except the root. The height should be tracked recursively based on depth, not reset globally.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect reset of global variable k after each insertion; height should be tracked recursively, not reset to 1 for each new number.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Resetting 'k' to 1 after each insertion breaks the height tracking for subsequent insertions that require deeper traversal.]

37.reason: [Error: When p->lc is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault because search tries to access p->lc->data without checking if p->lc is NULL. The condition only checks if both children are NULL, but if one child is NULL and the other is not, it still calls search on the NULL child.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When p->lc is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault because search tries to access p->lc->data without checking if p->lc is NULL. The condition only checks if both children are NULL, but if one child is NULL and the other is not, it still calls search on the NULL child.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Potential null pointer dereference: p->lc may be NULL, causing crash when accessing p->data in the recursive call.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: calling search on a NULL child causes segmentation fault; should check if p->lc != NULL before recursing.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [If p->lc is NULL, calling search(p->lc) will cause a segmentation fault (runtime error). Need to check for NULL before recursing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If p->lc is NULL, calling search(p->lc) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer, causing runtime error]

1.reason: [Using a global variable 'k' to track height is incorrect because it doesn't represent the actual depth of the current node in the recursion. Height should be passed as a parameter or computed based on parent's height.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Using a global variable 'k' to track height is incorrect because it doesn't represent the actual depth of the current node in the recursion. Height should be passed as a parameter or computed based on parent's height.]

14.reason: [Assigning global 'k' as roof (height) is wrong. The height of a new node should be parent's height + 1, but 'k' is being manipulated globally and reset after each insertion.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Assigning global 'k' as roof (height) is wrong. The height of a new node should be parent's height + 1, but 'k' is being manipulated globally and reset after each insertion.]
